name: Northfield Farmers Market
notes: On-file website (stapletondenver.com) is fully dead (connection refused, domain no longer resolves to a working site). The market is/was located at the Shops at Northfield / Northfield Stapleton shopping center (8340 Northfield Blvd, parking lot between Target and Bass Pro Shops), which has since rebranded to 'Avenues at Northfield' (avenuesatnorthfield.com, formerly shopsatnorthfield.com, which 301-redirects to it). Could not verify avenuesatnorthfield.com directly — it returns HTTP 403 (bot-blocked) to automated fetches, and current search-indexed content for that site shows unrelated events (car shows, safety expos), with no farmers-market page found via site search. The shopping center's original farmers-market press release page (shopsatnorthfield.com/press-release/NEW-Farmers-Market-at-Northfield-Stapleton) now 404s. A CropCart directory listing for this market exists but explicitly states hours/contact/SNAP are 'not listed' and unverified. A candidate Facebook page (facebook.com/Northfield-Farmers-Market-458614137924669) surfaced in search but could not be rendered/confirmed to be the Denver, CO market (same name is used by unrelated Northfield markets in VT/MN/MA) — not included due to lack of confidence. Third-party aggregators (colorado.com, thelocalcolorado.com) consistently repeat 'every Saturday 9am-2pm through October 31' but this text appears to trace back to the same now-dead/stale press release (colorado.com even links to mca80238.com/programs/signature-events/summer-markets as this market's 'website', but that MCA80238 page actually describes a different, currently-active market — 'The Green Farmers Market' at 29th Ave & Roslyn, i.e. the Stapleton Farmers' Market entry — not this Northfield/8340 Northfield Blvd market). Given no legitimate, currently-live official source could be confirmed, no fields are populated to avoid asserting stale or misattributed facts. Recommend manual verification of whether this market still operates at the Avenues at Northfield location.
